title: Internal social client configs must keep account access pending until owner input exists
lesson: When converting a draft social media operations shell into a real internal brand workspace, replace placeholders only for owner-provided business configuration while keeping platform handles pending, account connection status not_connected, posting mode draft_only, approvalRequired true, livePostingBlocked true, scheduling blocked, analytics blocked, social OAuth disconnected, credentialsStored false, and n8n activation blocked.
whyThisMatters: Real internal configuration can make the system useful without crossing into credential handling, account connection, scheduling, posting, analytics, or automation activation.
whenToUse: Use when reviewing future internal brand or client-draft social media system configuration updates before any live connector approval.
whenNotToUse: Do not treat this candidate lesson as approval to merge, deploy, connect accounts, use credentials, schedule, post, activate automations, or create accepted memory.
notes: Candidate only. Not accepted permanent truth until reviewed and promoted per docs/memory-learning-policy.md.
